query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY SEQ_IN_INDEX) as COLUMNS FROM information_schema.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('inspection_items', 'coupons') GROUP BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PAf3reHgcPDAtuw.root --database FqYRztyCVa3fHbrFjU6jAV --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY SEQ_IN_INDEX) as COLUMNS FROM information_schema.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('inspection_items', 'coupons') GROUP BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME;
stdout:
TABLE_NAME	INDEX_NAME	COLUMNS
coupons	PRIMARY	id
coupons	idx_coupons_active	isActive
coupons	idx_coupons_code	code
coupons	idx_coupons_featured	isFeatured
inspection_items	PRIMARY	id
inspection_items	idx_inspection_items_inspection	inspectionId
inspection_items	idx_inspection_items_condition	condition
